pageDescriptionBefore: This mortgage recast calculator, also known as a recast mortgage calculator, helps you instantly calculate your
pageDescriptionAfter: after a lump-sum payment. No login required.
inputsSubtitle: Enter your loan details and lump-sum payment; defaults follow typical U.S. mortgage assumptions.
hintRemainingTerm: Months left on your loan at the current interest rate.
hintLumpSum: One-time payment applied to principal before the loan is recast.
hintRecastFee: Some lenders charge $250–$500 to recast. Enter $0 if not applicable.
importantBody: This calculator provides estimated recast results for planning only. Recast availability, fees, and minimum payment amounts vary by lender. Always confirm terms with your mortgage servicer before making a lump-sum payment.
resultsSubtitle: Based on your inputs and standard amortization over the remaining term
emptyHint: Enter your loan details and click “Calculate recast” to see your new payment and savings here.
breakdownNote: Estimated total interest over the remaining loan term before and after recast.
proTip1: Recasting lowers your monthly payment but keeps your rate and remaining term — unlike refinancing.
proTip2: Most lenders require a minimum lump sum ($5,000–$10,000) and that you are current on payments.
proTip3: Compare net savings (interest saved minus recast fee) before sending a large principal payment.
proTip4: Recasting does not shorten your loan term; extra principal without recast reduces term instead.
proTip5: Not all loans qualify — FHA, VA, and some jumbo loans may have different rules.
errOriginalAmount: Enter a valid original loan amount.
errInterestRate: Enter a valid interest rate (0% or greater).
errRemainingTerm: Enter remaining years greater than zero.
errLumpSum: Lump sum must be greater than zero and less than the current balance.
errRecastFee: Enter a valid recast fee (0 or greater).
